loggedOut.title: Every arrow tells a story
loggedOut.subtitle: Logginhood is the home for archers, clubs, and scores — AI photo scoring, automatic Archery GB classifications, and progress you can actually see. Join your club and measure up against archers around the world.

features.heading: Built for archers who want to get better

scoring.title: AI photo scoring
scoring.body: Snap a photo of your target face and Logginhood reads the arrows and totals your round — no manual tallying.

progress.title: Progress you can see
progress.body: Automatic classifications, handicaps, and personal bests tracked across every round you shoot.

clubs.title: Clubs & competitions
clubs.body: Join your club, climb the leaderboards, and take part in competitions with archers around the world.

cta.title: Ready to track your next round?
cta.body: Create a free account and log your first round in minutes.

noClub.title: You're not in a club yet
noClub.description: Join a club to compare scores, appear on leaderboards, and take part in tournaments.

noScores.title: No scores logged yet
noScores.description: Log your first round to start tracking your progress.
